title: My+
description: You'll never feel more immersed in Minecraft the way you do with this modpack! Minimal UI, enhanced vanilla features, and much more! Requires a beefy pc
body: This modpack aims to completely overhaul the feel of minecraft. though minimal UI, a realistic camera and MUCH MORE, you'll never feel more immersed in minecraft the way you do with this modpack! Beyond just immersion, the vanilla experience has been enhanced quite a bit, through improved dimensions, caves, oceans, and much more to explore in the overworld. This just may be your new favorite vanilla+ish IMMERSIVE adventure modpack!
